feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 発注伝票納入先住所について
entry.content:
仕入先直送受注伝票ヘッダの「出荷先コード」を変更し、同時に変更後の出荷先の「住所」も変更された後、発注明細「50」のみの「納入先住所コード」が空白の状態となっていました。

※詳細は添付ファイル「【問い合わせ資料】発注伝票納入先住所について.xlsx」をご参照ください。

entry.title: 発注伝票納入先住所について Regarding the delivery address on the order slip
entry.content:
仕入先直送受注伝票ヘッダの「出荷先コード」を変更し、同時に変更後の出荷先の「住所」も変更された後、発注明細「50」のみの「納入先住所コード」が空白の状態となっていました。
※詳細は添付ファイル「【問い合わせ資料】発注伝票納入先住所について.xlsx」をご参照ください。
The "shipping destination code" in the header of the direct order invoice from the supplier was changed, and at the same time, the address of the changed shipping destination was also updated. However, the "delivery address code" in the order detail "50" remained blank. *For more details, please refer to the attached file "[Inquiry Material] About Delivery Address of Order Invoice.xlsx."
上記の状況はSAP標準機能の不具合のようので、根本原因についてご確認いただけますと幸いです。
The above situation seems to be a bug in the SAP standard functionality, so I would appreciate it if you could check on the root cause.

entry.title: OSS Note 2633052 for S4Core 108 available?
entry.content:
Hello,

there is the OSS note 2633052 which is for the software components S4Core 101 and S4Core 102.

Our system has the component S4Core 108, but we would like to implement the functionality from the above mentioned note.

The requirement is to be able to preview Sales Billing document form layouts during their creation in VF01 and VF04, before they are posted.

Is there a newer note for this functionality?

Thanks and kind regards

Andrej

entry.title: SAP Web dispatcher error
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using permission table (via parameter "wdisp/permission_table") in the new SAP Web Dispatcher we installed and we want the case sensitivity not to be active. How can we go about this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Final settlement is not considering the previous settlement amount in Multi Payee Condition contract
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have one issue in CCM- Condition contracts Management.

In Multi Payee Scenario, System is not adjusting the amount in the final settlement considering the partial settlement amount which was already settled but creating final settlement document with exact amount like in partial settlement document and not determining RES2 condition type.
Final settlement is considering previous settlement amount only when the Bill to party number is same as Sold to Party and determining RES2 in final settlement document.

Request you to share the inputs.

#Settlement Management   SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales   SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Need explanation on the MENGE value in the OSS note 3382819
entry.content:
hi,

In the OSS note 3382819 - MR11/MR11SHOW - Calculation logic for GR/IR clearing, the calculation details for the MR11 cancellation amount are explained.

But in the formula, a variable MENGE is used but this one is not explained. Can someone help me to understand the calculation ?

Thanks in advance for your feedback,

Regards, 
Céline JOMARD
SAP FI specialist

entry.title: Issue in UNIT_CONVERSION in CDS View Entity
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to perform unit conversion in CDS view entities in version 75I. So, trying to use unit_conversion, however it ends with SQL code 719.
My CDS view:

Error with execution:

Database returned the SQL code 719. Error text: currency/unit conversion error: search table error: Conversion( "COL$11$" ),
row 0: could not determine valid conversion rate for value(s) 7 from unit 'ST' to unit 'KAR' for client '010'

Both these unit are part of T006 table.

Could you please provide valuable inputs to solve the same.

Regards,

JR

entry.title: S4 Hana on premise and BP 41V - Presales
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

we activated BP 41V in our S4 Hana on premise system and I have problem when creating folow-up documents for an opportunity. According to the script I should be able to create Sales Quotation (QT) as a follow-up document for Opportunity (OPPT). But when I click on icon for Follow-up I see only Activity types (see the attachment), Quotation is missing. Customizing is updated based on the Set-up document for 41V. Any advice how can I add additonal document types to the list of Follow-up documents?

Thanks 

Peter

entry.title: Ad hoc Query/Report Creation in SAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am looking for a tool (third party like toad, etc. or native) that can help in creating ad hoc queries/reports using SAP tables. Something similar, but way better than SQVI tcode (since this is not that user friendly and has a few limitations). The requirement is for non-developers to be able to create their own queries/reports directly in production environment based on their SAP access (and not have their users created on HANA DB). What would be the best tool in this case? I tried to connect Toad but that asked for hana db details (containers, OS/DB credentials, etc.).

entry.title: Submission aus Anfrage wird nicht in Bestellung übernommen
entry.content:
Hallo,

wenn wir eine Submissionsnummer in der Anfrage eintragen, wird diese bei der Bestellanlage aus dem Angebot nicht übernommen. Was muss hier eingestellt werden.

Danke für Ihre Rückmeldung

Viele Grüße

Robert Haller

entry.title: sftp is source having csv 10 records and target must be 10 different idoc customers in s4 hana.
entry.content:
sftp is source having csv 10 records and target must be 10 different idoc customers in s4 hana. How can we acheive this

 

Regards,

Satish

entry.title: SAP Sandbox
entry.content: Hi - new to this so please excuse if a naive question (!) - My company has a SaaS system that allows our users to record their carbon usage across their organisation facilitating mandatory reporting on carbon emissions. We have a requirement to automatically pull in BOM, Supplier, Supplier Email and PCF data relating to BOM items, if applicable, from SAP 4/HANA. We would need to subsequently synchronise the data - so if anything changed in the BOM etc. the SaaS system would remain in sync. We could poll the SAP system to look for changes but I believe we could also be notified of any updates using SAP Event Mesh ? Are there any SAP sandbox systems - on premise version and cloud version - where we could look to develop this functionality from our side - access the relevant API's, populate with test data etc.?

entry.title: CJ42 S4 HANA Fiori Apps
entry.content: I understand that classical planning transactions like CJ42 are no longer available in menu. But the t codes are still available for use. Is overall revenue planning dropped from Fiori app perspective or what is the relevant app for CJ42?

entry.title: Unable to edit ARIBA PR after PO creation.
entry.content:
PR and PO is created in ARIBA and in SAP with help of BAPI.

When trying to change the PR in ARIBA, the SAP is throwing the error SE721.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to make customer taxable or non taxable based on the if customer is reselling or using?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have requirement to use US client as taxable or not based if customer is reselling it should be non taxable and if customer is using it then i will be taxable. We are using vertex system to calculate taxes in S4 public cloud system. Vertex suggested to use usage flag as taxable or not but we are not sending it to vertex via CPI as we are using standard workflow. 

Please advise how to resolve this issue or we have any alternative solution to use customer as taxable or not

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA 21 CFR Part 11 Compliance Capability
entry.content: I read this whitepaper (sap-business-technology-platform-in-gxp-environments.pdf) and in the appendix, its not quite clear if SAP cloud systems can be configured (not customized) to be 21 CFR Part 11 compliant for electronic records and electronic signatures. Especially in cloud environments where the ability to customize is either not available or limited, please advise if SAP S4/HANA can be configured by customers to be Part 11 compliant.

entry.title: Mass Change of Sales Orders / F5211
entry.content:
Hi team,

On the F5211 the Mass Change of Sales Orders app the button Reject will be possible to be used only for different items on the Sales orders via version 2023 FPS01?

Thanks,

KR,

Sérgio

entry.title: Mass Upload Data for Manage Teams and Responsibilities Application
entry.content:
Your requirement is to mass maintain teams in Manage Teams and Responsibilities Fiori application.

entry.title: How to add Team Owner in Manage Teams & Responsibilities
entry.content:
How can you add a user in Team Owner option in Manage Teams & Responsibilities.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP FIORI APP upgrade impact analysis
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We have upgraded SAP S/4HANA (Sandbox) from 1909 to 2023 FPS2. As we went through the post checks, we have found the following issue.

Made a spot check of F0928A which according to the analysis should not be available. This turned out not to be true, also the Readiness check report did not contain information about the app being unavailable.

  • Fiori apps extracted from our roles and analyzed in the Fiori upgrade impact analysis tool as provided by SAP
  • A list of 41 unavailable APPs identified
  • Random APP amongst the 41 checked in our system and is still seemingly working just fine.

Questions:

  • Are the APPs in the list still available but “not recommended”?
  • Is the list not accurate, “false positives”?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
